summary: Iteration 138: Comprehensive testing of ManoProtect AppCliente security features. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend UI tests passed (100%). Features tested: alarm status CRUD with PIN, security zones (6 default), cameras (3 default), events history, SOS with geolocation, emergency contacts CRUD, settings (PIN change, night mode zones), referral system, and Stripe subscription.
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with unique UUIDs. Default zones (6) and cameras (3) auto-seeded on first access.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AppCliente at /app-cliente is fully functional. All security features working: alarm arm/disarm with PIN verification, 6 security zones with battery levels, 3 cameras, event history logging, SOS with geolocation, emergency contacts CRUD, settings management. Trial system shows 6 days remaining. Referral code system working. Stripe subscription checkout working.
